# 修复 Bug

根据用户描述的问题，定位并修复 Bug。

## 参数

 — Bug 描述或错误信息

## 执行步骤

1. **理解问题**：分析用户描述的 bug 现象
2. **定位代码**：搜索相关代码文件，找到问题根因
3. **分析原因**：确定 bug 的根本原因，而非表面现象
4. **制定方案**：提出修复方案，说明修改思路
5. **实施修复**：修改代码，确保不引入新问题
6. **验证**：如果有测试，运行相关测试确认修复

## 原则

- 优先定位根本原因，不要只处理表面症状
- 修改范围最小化，只改必要的代码
- 保持向后兼容，除非明确需要破坏性变更
- 如果 bug 涉及多个可能原因，先列出所有可能性再逐一排查
- 修复后在关键位置添加防御性代码，防止同类问题再次发生

<?php

namespace App\Service;

use App\Lib\Facade\OfficialApiLib;
use App\Models\BackgroundCheckInquiryMd;
use App\Models\BackgroundCheckRecordMd;
use App\Models\FileStorePathMd;
use App\Models\OnboardingReviewMd;
use App\Models\RecruitmentProcessionMd;
use App\Models\ResumeMd;
use App\Support\Common\AuthRecord;
use Illuminate\Support\Arr;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class BackgroundCheckService
{
    /**
     * 获取背调记录列表，按工作经历段分组，每条经历内按创建时间倒序.
     * 动态检测 pending 超 1 个月改为 expired，并附加 last_update_time.
     */
    public function getList(int $recProId): array
    {
        $records = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::where('rec_pro_id', $recProId)
            ->orderBy('work_experience_index')
            ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
            ->get()
            ->toArray();

        foreach ($records as &$r) {
            if ($r['status'] === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_PENDING && !empty($r['sent_at'])) {
                $sentAt = strtotime($r['sent_at']);
                if ($sentAt && (time() - $sentAt) > 30 * 86400) {
                    BackgroundCheckRecordMd::where('id', $r['id'])->update(['status' => BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_EXPIRED]);
                    $r['status'] = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_EXPIRED;
                }
            }
            $r['last_update_time'] = ($r['status'] === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_FEEDBACK && !empty($r['feedback_at']))
                ? $r['feedback_at']
                : ($r['sent_at'] ?? $r['created_at'] ?? '');
        }
        unset($r);

        $grouped = [];
        foreach ($records as $r) {
            $key = (int)$r['work_experience_index'];
            if (!isset($grouped[$key])) {
                $grouped[$key] = [];
            }
            $grouped[$key][] = $r;
        }
        return ['list' => $grouped, 'data' => $records];
    }

    /**
     * 发起背调邮件.
     */
    public function send(array $input): array
    {
        $recProId = (int)$input['rec_pro_id'];
        $rec = RecruitmentProcessionMd::find($recProId);
        if (!$rec) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.recruitment_procession_not_exist'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $resume = ResumeMd::with('GetResumeExperience')->find($rec->resume_id);
        if (!$resume) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.resume_not_exist'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $workIndex = (int)Arr::get($input, 'work_experience_index', 1);
        if ($workIndex < 1 || $workIndex > 3) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.invalid_work_experience_index'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        // 校验录用材料中必须有背调授权书
        $attachFile = $this->getBackgroundCheckAuthFile($resume->id);
        if (!$attachFile) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_auth_file_required'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $experiences = ($resume->get_resume_experience ?? collect())->toArray();
        $workExp = $this->getWorkExperienceByIndex($experiences, $workIndex);
        if (!$workExp) {
            $company = trim(Arr::get($input, 'company', ''));
            $position = trim(Arr::get($input, 'position', ''));
            $startDate = trim(Arr::get($input, 'start_date', ''));
            $endDate = trim(Arr::get($input, 'end_date', ''));
            if ($company === '' || $position === '' || $startDate === '' || $endDate === '') {
                throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.work_experience_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
            }
            $workExp = [
                'name' => $company,
                'company_name' => $company,
                'position' => $position,
                'description' => $position,
                'start_time' => $startDate,
                'end_time' => $endDate,
            ];
        }

        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::create([
            'rec_pro_id' => $recProId,
            'resume_id' => $resume->id,
            'work_experience_index' => $workIndex,
            'company' => Arr::get($input, 'company', $workExp['name'] ?? $workExp['company_name'] ?? ''),
            'position' => Arr::get($input, 'position', $this->getWorkExpPositionDefault($workExp)),
            'work_location' => Arr::get($input, 'work_location', ''),
            'employment_type' => Arr::get($input, 'employment_type', ''),
            'start_date' => Arr::get($input, 'start_date', $workExp['start_time'] ?? ''),
            'end_date' => Arr::get($input, 'end_date', $workExp['end_time'] ?? ''),
            'salary_structure' => Arr::get($input, 'salary_structure', ''),
            'departure_type' => Arr::get($input, 'departure_type', ''),
            'has_compensation' => Arr::get($input, 'has_compensation', ''),
            'background_check_email' => Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', ''),
            'email_search' => Arr::get($input, 'email_search', Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', '')),
            'status' => BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_PENDING,
            'email_subject' => Arr::get($input, 'email_subject', ''),
            'email_content' => Arr::get($input, 'email_content', ''),
            'sent_at' => now(),
        ]);

        $hrNickname = AuthRecord::user()->nickname ?? '';
        app(BackgroundCheckQueryService::class)->syncFromRecord($record, null, $hrNickname);

        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 更新背调记录的邮件内容（用于发送前写入带 token 的 feedbackUrl）.
     */
    public function updateEmailContent(int $backgroundCheckId, string $emailSubject, string $emailContent): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $record->update(['email_subject' => $emailSubject, 'email_content' => $emailContent]);
        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 生成背调反馈链接 token，供 background.html 使用（参考应聘登记 candidate.html）.
     * info 包含完整配置供 get-config 使用，避免 official-chn 回调 hr.
     */
    public function generateToken(int $backgroundCheckId, string $idSign = '', string $dataInfo = ''): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $token = $idSign ?: Str::random(32);
        $expireDays = 90;
        setAuthorityToken($token, [$backgroundCheckId], ['anonymous'], $expireDays * 86400, 'background_check');

        if ($dataInfo) {
            $info = $dataInfo;
        } else {
            $resume = $record->resume;
            $candidateName = $resume ? ($resume->username ?? $resume->nickname ?? '') : '';
            $identification = $resume ? ($resume->identification ?? '') : '';
            $info = my_json_encode([
                'background_check_id' => $backgroundCheckId,
                'rec_pro_id' => $record->rec_pro_id,
                'resume_id' => $record->resume_id,
                'candidate_name' => $candidateName,
                'identification' => $identification,
                'company' => $record->company ?? '',
                'work_location' => $record->work_location ?? '',
                'employment_type' => $record->employment_type ?? '',
                'start_date' => $record->start_date ?? '',
                'end_date' => $record->end_date ?? '',
                'position' => $record->position ?? '',
                'salary_structure' => $record->salary_structure ?? '',
                'departure_type' => $record->departure_type ?? '',
                'has_compensation' => $record->has_compensation ?? '',
            ]);
        }

        OfficialApiLib::sendRequest('official-api/common/record-id-sign', [
            'id_sign' => $token,
            'type' => 'background_check',
            'info' => $info,
        ]);
        return ['token' => $token];
    }

    /**
     * 重发背调邮件.
     */
    public function resend(array $input): array
    {
        $id = (int)Arr::get($input, 'background_check_id');
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($id);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $newEmail = Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', $record->background_check_email);
        $newEmailSearch = Arr::get($input, 'email_search', $record->email_search ?? '');
        $record->update([
            'background_check_email' => $newEmail,
            'email_search' => $newEmailSearch,
            'sent_at' => now(),
        ]);
        // 同步更新关联 inquiry 的 email_search
        BackgroundCheckInquiryMd::where('background_check_record_id', $record->id)
            ->update(['background_check_email' => $newEmail, 'email_search' => $newEmailSearch]);

        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 获取背调详情（查看邮件）. 直接返回存储的 email_content/email_subject，含占位符，由前端替换.
     */
    public function getDetail(int $backgroundCheckId): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $arr = $record->toArray();
        $arr['last_update_time'] = ($record->status === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_FEEDBACK && $record->feedback_at)
            ? $record->feedback_at
            : ($record->sent_at ?? $record->created_at ?? '');
        return $arr;
    }

    /**
     * 根据背调记录 ID 获取背调授权书附件信息（供 mail/send 使用，避免前端传加密 path）.
     */
    public function getBackgroundCheckAuthFileForMail(int $backgroundCheckId): ?array
    {
        Log::info('[背调附件] getBackgroundCheckAuthFileForMail background_check_id='.$backgroundCheckId);
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 背调记录不存在 background_check_id='.$backgroundCheckId);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] 背调记录 resume_id='.$record->resume_id);
        return $this->getBackgroundCheckAuthFile($record->resume_id);
    }

    /**
     * 根据背调记录 ID 和前端选中的附件索引，获取对应的单个背调授权书附件.
     */
    public function getBackgroundCheckAuthFileByIndex(int $backgroundCheckId, ?int $attachIndex = null): ?array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            return null;
        }
        $allFiles = $this->getAllBackgroundCheckAuthFiles($record->resume_id);
        if (empty($allFiles)) {
            return null;
        }
        if ($attachIndex !== null && isset($allFiles[$attachIndex])) {
            return $allFiles[$attachIndex];
        }
        return $allFiles[0] ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * 获取所有背调授权书文件（type=backgroundCheck）.
     *
     * @return array[] 每项包含 disk, file_store_path, file_real_name
     */
    private function getAllBackgroundCheckAuthFiles(int $resumeId): array
    {
        $or = OnboardingReviewMd::where('resume_id', $resumeId)->orderBy('id', 'desc')->first();
        if (!$or) {
            return [];
        }
        $files = FileStorePathMd::where('table_name', 'onboarding_review')
            ->where('table_id', $or->id)
            ->where('type', 'backgroundCheck')
            ->where('is_on', 1)
            ->get();
        $result = [];
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $result[] = [
                'disk' => $file->disk ?: 'onboarding_review',
                'file_store_path' => $file->file_store_path,
                'file_real_name' => $file->file_real_name ?? '',
            ];
        }
        return $result;
    }

    private function getWorkExperienceByIndex(array $experiences, int $index): ?array
    {
        $workList = array_values(array_filter((array)$experiences, function ($e) {
            $e = is_array($e) ? $e : (array)$e;
            return strtolower(trim($e['type'] ?? '')) === 'work';
        }));
        if (empty($workList) || $index < 1 || $index > count($workList)) {
            return null;
        }
        usort($workList, function ($a, $b) {
            $a = is_array($a) ? $a : (array)$a;
            $b = is_array($b) ? $b : (array)$b;
            $endA = strtotime($a['end_time'] ?? $a['start_time'] ?? '0');
            $endB = strtotime($b['end_time'] ?? $b['start_time'] ?? '0');
            return $endB <=> $endA;
        });
        return $workList[$index - 1] ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * 从录用材料中获取背调授权书文件（type=backgroundCheck）.
     * @return null|array{disk: string, file_store_path: string, file_real_name: string}
     */
    private function getBackgroundCheckAuthFile(int $resumeId): ?array
    {
        Log::info('[背调附件] getBackgroundCheckAuthFile resume_id='.$resumeId);
        $or = OnboardingReviewMd::where('resume_id', $resumeId)->orderBy('id', 'desc')->first();
        if (!$or) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 未找到 onboarding_review resume_id='.$resumeId);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] onboarding_review id='.$or->id);
        $file = FileStorePathMd::where('table_name', 'onboarding_review')
            ->where('table_id', $or->id)
            ->where('type', 'backgroundCheck')
            ->where('is_on', 1)
            ->first();
        if (!$file) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 未找到 type=backgroundCheck 文件 table_id='.$or->id);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] FileStorePath id='.$file->id.', disk='.$file->disk.', file_store_path='.$file->file_store_path);
        return [
            'disk' => $file->disk ?: 'onboarding_review',
            'file_store_path' => $file->file_store_path,
            'file_real_name' => $file->file_real_name ?? '',
        ];
    }

    private function getWorkExpPositionDefault(array $workExp): string
    {
        if (!empty($workExp['position'])) {
            return $workExp['position'];
        }
        $desc = $workExp['description'] ?? '';
        if ($desc) {
            $parts = explode(' | ', $desc);
            return $parts[0] ?? '';
        }
        return '';
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Service\BackgroundCheckService;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class BackgroundCheckController extends Controller
{
    /** @var BackgroundCheckService */
    protected $service;

    public function __construct(BackgroundCheckService $service)
    {
        $this->service = $service;
    }

    /**
     * 背调记录列表.
     */
    public function list(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['rec_pro_id']);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'rec_pro_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        $data = $this->service->getList((int)$input['rec_pro_id']);
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
    }

    /**
     * 发起背调邮件.
     */
    public function send(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only([
            'rec_pro_id', 'work_experience_index', 'company', 'position', 'work_location',
            'employment_type', 'start_date', 'end_date', 'salary_structure', 'departure_type',
            'has_compensation', 'background_check_email', 'email_search', 'email_subject', 'email_content',
        ]);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'rec_pro_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
            'work_experience_index' => 'required|integer|in:1,2',
            'company' => 'required|string',
            'position' => 'required|string',
            'work_location' => 'required|string',
            'employment_type' => 'required|string',
            'start_date' => 'required|string',
            'end_date' => 'required|string',
            'salary_structure' => 'required|string',
            'departure_type' => 'required|string|in:主动离职,协商一致,合同到期,公司辞退',
            'has_compensation' => 'required|string|in:是,否',
            'background_check_email' => 'required|string',
            'email_subject' => 'required|string',
            'email_content' => 'required|string',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        try {
            $data = $this->service->send($input);
            return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
        } catch (\App\Exceptions\UserException $e) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($e->getMessage(), $e->getCode());
        }
    }

    /**
     * 更新背调记录的邮件内容.
     */
    public function updateEmailContent(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['background_check_id', 'email_subject', 'email_content']);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'background_check_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
            'email_subject' => 'required|string',
            'email_content' => 'required|string',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        try {
            $data = $this->service->updateEmailContent(
                (int)$input['background_check_id'],
                $input['email_subject'],
                $input['email_content']
            );
            return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
        } catch (\App\Exceptions\UserException $e) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($e->getMessage(), $e->getCode());
        }
    }

    /**
     * 生成背调反馈链接 token（参考应聘登记 generate-staff-token）.
     */
    public function generateToken(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['background_check_id', 'id_sign', 'data_info']);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'background_check_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
            'id_sign' => 'nullable|string',
            'data_info' => 'nullable|string',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        try {
            $data = $this->service->generateToken(
                (int)$input['background_check_id'],
                $input['id_sign'] ?? '',
                $input['data_info'] ?? ''
            );
            return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
        } catch (\App\Exceptions\UserException $e) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($e->getMessage(), $e->getCode());
        }
    }

    /**
     * 重发背调邮件.
     */
    public function resend(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['background_check_id', 'background_check_email', 'email_search']);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'background_check_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
            'background_check_email' => 'required|string',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        try {
            $data = $this->service->resend($input);
            return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
        } catch (\App\Exceptions\UserException $e) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($e->getMessage(), $e->getCode());
        }
    }

    /**
     * 背调详情（查看邮件）.
     */
    public function detail(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['background_check_id']);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'background_check_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        try {
            $data = $this->service->getDetail((int)$input['background_check_id']);
            return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
        } catch (\App\Exceptions\UserException $e) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($e->getMessage(), $e->getCode());
        }
    }
}

content.text:
### Bug 3: Fix "至今" end_date issue

This bug has multiple root causes（根因）:

1. **Frontend `fillFromWorkExperience`**: When `end_time` is empty (currently employed), `end_date` becomes `''`
2. **Frontend `selectedWorkExp` sorting**: Empty `end_time` sorts to bottom instead of top (currently employed = most recent)
3. **Backend validation**: `'end_date' => 'required|string'` rejects empty end_date
4. **Backend service**: Line 89 also rejects empty endDate

**Fix approach（修复思路）**:
- Frontend: When `end_time` is empty, set `end_date` to `'至今'` and auto-set `is_employed` to `'是'`
- Frontend: Fix sorting to treat empty end_time as "most recent"
- Backend: Allow `end_date` to be nullable
- Backend service: Allow empty endDate when work experience exists

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Service\BackgroundCheckService;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class BackgroundCheckController extends Controller
{
    /** @var BackgroundCheckService */
    protected $service;

    public function __construct(BackgroundCheckService $service)
    {
        $this->service = $service;
    }

    /**
     * 背调记录列表.
     */
    public function list(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $input = $request->only(['rec_pro_id']);
        $validator = Validator::make($input, [
            'rec_pro_id' => 'required|integer|min:1',
        ]);
        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return $this->responseJsonFail($validator->errors()->first(), 422);
        }
        $data = $this->service->getList((int)$input['rec_pro_id']);
        return $this->responseJsonSuccess($data);
    }

    /**
     * 发起背调邮件.
     */
    public function send(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {

<?php

namespace App\Service;

use App\Lib\Facade\OfficialApiLib;
use App\Models\BackgroundCheckInquiryMd;
use App\Models\BackgroundCheckRecordMd;
use App\Models\FileStorePathMd;
use App\Models\OnboardingReviewMd;
use App\Models\RecruitmentProcessionMd;
use App\Models\ResumeMd;
use App\Support\Common\AuthRecord;
use Illuminate\Support\Arr;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class BackgroundCheckService
{
    /**
     * 获取背调记录列表，按工作经历段分组，每条经历内按创建时间倒序.
     * 动态检测 pending 超 1 个月改为 expired，并附加 last_update_time.
     */
    public function getList(int $recProId): array
    {
        $records = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::where('rec_pro_id', $recProId)
            ->orderBy('work_experience_index')
            ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
            ->get()
            ->toArray();

        foreach ($records as &$r) {
            if ($r['status'] === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_PENDING && !empty($r['sent_at'])) {
                $sentAt = strtotime($r['sent_at']);
                if ($sentAt && (time() - $sentAt) > 30 * 86400) {
                    BackgroundCheckRecordMd::where('id', $r['id'])->update(['status' => BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_EXPIRED]);
                    $r['status'] = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_EXPIRED;
                }
            }
            $r['last_update_time'] = ($r['status'] === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_FEEDBACK && !empty($r['feedback_at']))
                ? $r['feedback_at']
                : ($r['sent_at'] ?? $r['created_at'] ?? '');
        }
        unset($r);

        $grouped = [];
        foreach ($records as $r) {
            $key = (int)$r['work_experience_index'];
            if (!isset($grouped[$key])) {
                $grouped[$key] = [];
            }
            $grouped[$key][] = $r;
        }
        return ['list' => $grouped, 'data' => $records];
    }

    /**
     * 发起背调邮件.
     */
    public function send(array $input): array
    {
        $recProId = (int)$input['rec_pro_id'];
        $rec = RecruitmentProcessionMd::find($recProId);
        if (!$rec) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.recruitment_procession_not_exist'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $resume = ResumeMd::with('GetResumeExperience')->find($rec->resume_id);
        if (!$resume) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.resume_not_exist'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $workIndex = (int)Arr::get($input, 'work_experience_index', 1);
        if ($workIndex < 1 || $workIndex > 3) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.invalid_work_experience_index'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        // 校验录用材料中必须有背调授权书
        $attachFile = $this->getBackgroundCheckAuthFile($resume->id);
        if (!$attachFile) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_auth_file_required'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $experiences = ($resume->get_resume_experience ?? collect())->toArray();
        $workExp = $this->getWorkExperienceByIndex($experiences, $workIndex);
        if (!$workExp) {
            $company = trim(Arr::get($input, 'company', ''));
            $position = trim(Arr::get($input, 'position', ''));
            $startDate = trim(Arr::get($input, 'start_date', ''));
            $endDate = trim(Arr::get($input, 'end_date', ''));
            if ($company === '' || $position === '' || $startDate === '' || $endDate === '') {
                throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.work_experience_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
            }
            $workExp = [
                'name' => $company,
                'company_name' => $company,
                'position' => $position,
                'description' => $position,
                'start_time' => $startDate,
                'end_time' => $endDate,
            ];
        }

        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::create([
            'rec_pro_id' => $recProId,
            'resume_id' => $resume->id,
            'work_experience_index' => $workIndex,
            'company' => Arr::get($input, 'company', $workExp['name'] ?? $workExp['company_name'] ?? ''),
            'position' => Arr::get($input, 'position', $this->getWorkExpPositionDefault($workExp)),
            'work_location' => Arr::get($input, 'work_location', ''),
            'employment_type' => Arr::get($input, 'employment_type', ''),
            'start_date' => Arr::get($input, 'start_date', $workExp['start_time'] ?? ''),
            'end_date' => Arr::get($input, 'end_date', $workExp['end_time'] ?? ''),
            'salary_structure' => Arr::get($input, 'salary_structure', ''),
            'departure_type' => Arr::get($input, 'departure_type', ''),
            'has_compensation' => Arr::get($input, 'has_compensation', ''),
            'background_check_email' => Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', ''),
            'email_search' => Arr::get($input, 'email_search', Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', '')),
            'status' => BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_PENDING,
            'email_subject' => Arr::get($input, 'email_subject', ''),
            'email_content' => Arr::get($input, 'email_content', ''),
            'sent_at' => now(),
        ]);

        $hrNickname = AuthRecord::user()->nickname ?? '';
        app(BackgroundCheckQueryService::class)->syncFromRecord($record, null, $hrNickname);

        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 更新背调记录的邮件内容（用于发送前写入带 token 的 feedbackUrl）.
     */
    public function updateEmailContent(int $backgroundCheckId, string $emailSubject, string $emailContent): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $record->update(['email_subject' => $emailSubject, 'email_content' => $emailContent]);
        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 生成背调反馈链接 token，供 background.html 使用（参考应聘登记 candidate.html）.
     * info 包含完整配置供 get-config 使用，避免 official-chn 回调 hr.
     */
    public function generateToken(int $backgroundCheckId, string $idSign = '', string $dataInfo = ''): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $token = $idSign ?: Str::random(32);
        $expireDays = 90;
        setAuthorityToken($token, [$backgroundCheckId], ['anonymous'], $expireDays * 86400, 'background_check');

        if ($dataInfo) {
            $info = $dataInfo;
        } else {
            $resume = $record->resume;
            $candidateName = $resume ? ($resume->username ?? $resume->nickname ?? '') : '';
            $identification = $resume ? ($resume->identification ?? '') : '';
            $info = my_json_encode([
                'background_check_id' => $backgroundCheckId,
                'rec_pro_id' => $record->rec_pro_id,
                'resume_id' => $record->resume_id,
                'candidate_name' => $candidateName,
                'identification' => $identification,
                'company' => $record->company ?? '',
                'work_location' => $record->work_location ?? '',
                'employment_type' => $record->employment_type ?? '',
                'start_date' => $record->start_date ?? '',
                'end_date' => $record->end_date ?? '',
                'position' => $record->position ?? '',
                'salary_structure' => $record->salary_structure ?? '',
                'departure_type' => $record->departure_type ?? '',
                'has_compensation' => $record->has_compensation ?? '',
            ]);
        }

        OfficialApiLib::sendRequest('official-api/common/record-id-sign', [
            'id_sign' => $token,
            'type' => 'background_check',
            'info' => $info,
        ]);
        return ['token' => $token];
    }

    /**
     * 重发背调邮件.
     */
    public function resend(array $input): array
    {
        $id = (int)Arr::get($input, 'background_check_id');
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($id);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $newEmail = Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', $record->background_check_email);
        $newEmailSearch = Arr::get($input, 'email_search', $record->email_search ?? '');
        $record->update([
            'background_check_email' => $newEmail,
            'email_search' => $newEmailSearch,
            'sent_at' => now(),
        ]);
        // 同步更新关联 inquiry 的 email_search
        BackgroundCheckInquiryMd::where('background_check_record_id', $record->id)
            ->update(['background_check_email' => $newEmail, 'email_search' => $newEmailSearch]);

        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 获取背调详情（查看邮件）. 直接返回存储的 email_content/email_subject，含占位符，由前端替换.
     */
    public function getDetail(int $backgroundCheckId): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $arr = $record->toArray();
        $arr['last_update_time'] = ($record->status === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_FEEDBACK && $record->feedback_at)
            ? $record->feedback_at
            : ($record->sent_at ?? $record->created_at ?? '');
        return $arr;
    }

    /**
     * 根据背调记录 ID 获取背调授权书附件信息（供 mail/send 使用，避免前端传加密 path）.
     */
    public function getBackgroundCheckAuthFileForMail(int $backgroundCheckId): ?array
    {
        Log::info('[背调附件] getBackgroundCheckAuthFileForMail background_check_id='.$backgroundCheckId);
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 背调记录不存在 background_check_id='.$backgroundCheckId);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] 背调记录 resume_id='.$record->resume_id);
        return $this->getBackgroundCheckAuthFile($record->resume_id);
    }

    /**
     * 根据背调记录 ID 和前端选中的附件索引，获取对应的单个背调授权书附件.
     */
    public function getBackgroundCheckAuthFileByIndex(int $backgroundCheckId, ?int $attachIndex = null): ?array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            return null;
        }
        $allFiles = $this->getAllBackgroundCheckAuthFiles($record->resume_id);
        if (empty($allFiles)) {
            return null;
        }
        if ($attachIndex !== null && isset($allFiles[$attachIndex])) {
            return $allFiles[$attachIndex];
        }
        return $allFiles[0] ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * 获取所有背调授权书文件（type=backgroundCheck）.
     *
     * @return array[] 每项包含 disk, file_store_path, file_real_name
     */
    private function getAllBackgroundCheckAuthFiles(int $resumeId): array
    {
        $or = OnboardingReviewMd::where('resume_id', $resumeId)->orderBy('id', 'desc')->first();
        if (!$or) {
            return [];
        }
        $files = FileStorePathMd::where('table_name', 'onboarding_review')
            ->where('table_id', $or->id)
            ->where('type', 'backgroundCheck')
            ->where('is_on', 1)
            ->get();
        $result = [];
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $result[] = [
                'disk' => $file->disk ?: 'onboarding_review',
                'file_store_path' => $file->file_store_path,
                'file_real_name' => $file->file_real_name ?? '',
            ];
        }
        return $result;
    }

    private function getWorkExperienceByIndex(array $experiences, int $index): ?array
    {
        $workList = array_values(array_filter((array)$experiences, function ($e) {
            $e = is_array($e) ? $e : (array)$e;
            return strtolower(trim($e['type'] ?? '')) === 'work';
        }));
        if (empty($workList) || $index < 1 || $index > count($workList)) {
            return null;
        }
        usort($workList, function ($a, $b) {
            $a = is_array($a) ? $a : (array)$a;
            $b = is_array($b) ? $b : (array)$b;
            $endA = strtotime($a['end_time'] ?? $a['start_time'] ?? '0');
            $endB = strtotime($b['end_time'] ?? $b['start_time'] ?? '0');
            return $endB <=> $endA;
        });
        return $workList[$index - 1] ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * 从录用材料中获取背调授权书文件（type=backgroundCheck）.
     * @return null|array{disk: string, file_store_path: string, file_real_name: string}
     */
    private function getBackgroundCheckAuthFile(int $resumeId): ?array
    {
        Log::info('[背调附件] getBackgroundCheckAuthFile resume_id='.$resumeId);
        $or = OnboardingReviewMd::where('resume_id', $resumeId)->orderBy('id', 'desc')->first();
        if (!$or) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 未找到 onboarding_review resume_id='.$resumeId);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] onboarding_review id='.$or->id);
        $file = FileStorePathMd::where('table_name', 'onboarding_review')
            ->where('table_id', $or->id)
            ->where('type', 'backgroundCheck')
            ->where('is_on', 1)
            ->first();
        if (!$file) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 未找到 type=backgroundCheck 文件 table_id='.$or->id);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] FileStorePath id='.$file->id.', disk='.$file->disk.', file_store_path='.$file->file_store_path);
        return [
            'disk' => $file->disk ?: 'onboarding_review',
            'file_store_path' => $file->file_store_path,
            'file_real_name' => $file->file_real_name ?? '',
        ];
    }

    private function getWorkExpPositionDefault(array $workExp): string
    {
        if (!empty($workExp['position'])) {
            return $workExp['position'];
        }
        $desc = $workExp['description'] ?? '';
        if ($desc) {
            $parts = explode(' | ', $desc);
            return $parts[0] ?? '';
        }
        return '';
    }
}

                'description' => $position,
                'start_time' => $startDate,
                'end_time' => $endDate,
            ];
        }

        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::create([
            'rec_pro_id' => $recProId,
            'resume_id' => $resume->id,
            'work_experience_index' => $workIndex,
            'company' => Arr::get($input, 'company', $workExp['name'] ?? $workExp['company_name'] ?? ''),
            'position' => Arr::get($input, 'position', $this->getWorkExpPositionDefault($workExp)),
            'work_location' => Arr::get($input, 'work_location', ''),
            'employment_type' => Arr::get($input, 'employment_type', ''),
            'start_date' => Arr::get($input, 'start_date', $workExp['start_time'] ?? ''),
            'end_date' => Arr::get($input, 'end_date', $workExp['end_time'] ?? ''),
            'salary_structure' => Arr::get($input, 'salary_structure', ''),
            'departure_type' => Arr::get($input, 'departure_type', ''),
            'has_compensation' => Arr::get($input, 'has_compensation', ''),
            'background_check_email' => Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', ''),
            'email_search' => Arr::get($input, 'email_search', Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', '')),
            'status' => BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_PENDING,
            'email_subject' => Arr::get($input, 'email_subject', ''),
            'email_content' => Arr::get($input, 'email_content', ''),
            'sent_at' => now(),
        ]);

        $hrNickname = AuthRecord::user()->nickname ?? '';
        app(BackgroundCheckQueryService::class)->syncFromRecord($record, null, $hrNickname);

        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 更新背调记录的邮件内容（用于发送前写入带 token 的 feedbackUrl）.
     */
    public function updateEmailContent(int $backgroundCheckId, string $emailSubject, string $emailContent): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $record->update(['email_subject' => $emailSubject, 'email_content' => $emailContent]);
        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 生成背调反馈链接 token，供 background.html 使用（参考应聘登记 candidate.html）.
     * info 包含完整配置供 get-config 使用，避免 official-chn 回调 hr.
     */
    public function generateToken(int $backgroundCheckId, string $idSign = '', string $dataInfo = ''): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $token = $idSign ?: Str::random(32);
        $expireDays = 90;
        setAuthorityToken($token, [$backgroundCheckId], ['anonymous'], $expireDays * 86400, 'background_check');

        if ($dataInfo) {
            $info = $dataInfo;
        } else {
            $resume = $record->resume;
            $candidateName = $resume ? ($resume->username ?? $resume->nickname ?? '') : '';
            $identification = $resume ? ($resume->identification ?? '') : '';
            $info = my_json_encode([
                'background_check_id' => $backgroundCheckId,
                'rec_pro_id' => $record->rec_pro_id,
                'resume_id' => $record->resume_id,
                'candidate_name' => $candidateName,
                'identification' => $identification,
                'company' => $record->company ?? '',
                'work_location' => $record->work_location ?? '',
                'employment_type' => $record->employment_type ?? '',
                'start_date' => $record->start_date ?? '',
                'end_date' => $record->end_date ?? '',
                'position' => $record->position ?? '',
                'salary_structure' => $record->salary_structure ?? '',
                'departure_type' => $record->departure_type ?? '',
                'has_compensation' => $record->has_compensation ?? '',
            ]);
        }

        OfficialApiLib::sendRequest('official-api/common/record-id-sign', [
            'id_sign' => $token,
            'type' => 'background_check',
            'info' => $info,
        ]);
        return ['token' => $token];
    }

    /**
     * 重发背调邮件.
     */
    public function resend(array $input): array
    {
        $id = (int)Arr::get($input, 'background_check_id');
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($id);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }

        $newEmail = Arr::get($input, 'background_check_email', $record->background_check_email);
        $newEmailSearch = Arr::get($input, 'email_search', $record->email_search ?? '');
        $record->update([
            'background_check_email' => $newEmail,
            'email_search' => $newEmailSearch,
            'sent_at' => now(),
        ]);
        // 同步更新关联 inquiry 的 email_search
        BackgroundCheckInquiryMd::where('background_check_record_id', $record->id)
            ->update(['background_check_email' => $newEmail, 'email_search' => $newEmailSearch]);

        return ['id' => $record->id, 'success' => true];
    }

    /**
     * 获取背调详情（查看邮件）. 直接返回存储的 email_content/email_subject，含占位符，由前端替换.
     */
    public function getDetail(int $backgroundCheckId): array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            throw new \App\Exceptions\UserException(__('my_api.background_check_record_not_found'), \App\Exceptions\ExceptionCode::USER_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
        $arr = $record->toArray();
        $arr['last_update_time'] = ($record->status === BackgroundCheckRecordMd::STATUS_FEEDBACK && $record->feedback_at)
            ? $record->feedback_at
            : ($record->sent_at ?? $record->created_at ?? '');
        return $arr;
    }

    /**
     * 根据背调记录 ID 获取背调授权书附件信息（供 mail/send 使用，避免前端传加密 path）.
     */
    public function getBackgroundCheckAuthFileForMail(int $backgroundCheckId): ?array
    {
        Log::info('[背调附件] getBackgroundCheckAuthFileForMail background_check_id='.$backgroundCheckId);
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 背调记录不存在 background_check_id='.$backgroundCheckId);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] 背调记录 resume_id='.$record->resume_id);
        return $this->getBackgroundCheckAuthFile($record->resume_id);
    }

    /**
     * 根据背调记录 ID 和前端选中的附件索引，获取对应的单个背调授权书附件.
     */
    public function getBackgroundCheckAuthFileByIndex(int $backgroundCheckId, ?int $attachIndex = null): ?array
    {
        $record = BackgroundCheckRecordMd::find($backgroundCheckId);
        if (!$record) {
            return null;
        }
        $allFiles = $this->getAllBackgroundCheckAuthFiles($record->resume_id);
        if (empty($allFiles)) {
            return null;
        }
        if ($attachIndex !== null && isset($allFiles[$attachIndex])) {
            return $allFiles[$attachIndex];
        }
        return $allFiles[0] ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * 获取所有背调授权书文件（type=backgroundCheck）.
     *
     * @return array[] 每项包含 disk, file_store_path, file_real_name
     */
    private function getAllBackgroundCheckAuthFiles(int $resumeId): array
    {
        $or = OnboardingReviewMd::where('resume_id', $resumeId)->orderBy('id', 'desc')->first();
        if (!$or) {
            return [];
        }
        $files = FileStorePathMd::where('table_name', 'onboarding_review')
            ->where('table_id', $or->id)
            ->where('type', 'backgroundCheck')
            ->where('is_on', 1)
            ->get();
        $result = [];
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $result[] = [
                'disk' => $file->disk ?: 'onboarding_review',
                'file_store_path' => $file->file_store_path,
                'file_real_name' => $file->file_real_name ?? '',
            ];
        }
        return $result;
    }

    private function getWorkExperienceByIndex(array $experiences, int $index): ?array
    {
        $workList = array_values(array_filter((array)$experiences, function ($e) {
            $e = is_array($e) ? $e : (array)$e;
            return strtolower(trim($e['type'] ?? '')) === 'work';
        }));
        if (empty($workList) || $index < 1 || $index > count($workList)) {
            return null;
        }
        usort($workList, function ($a, $b) {
            $a = is_array($a) ? $a : (array)$a;
            $b = is_array($b) ? $b : (array)$b;
            $endA = strtotime($a['end_time'] ?? $a['start_time'] ?? '0');
            $endB = strtotime($b['end_time'] ?? $b['start_time'] ?? '0');
            return $endB <=> $endA;
        });
        return $workList[$index - 1] ?? null;
    }

    /**
     * 从录用材料中获取背调授权书文件（type=backgroundCheck）.
     * @return null|array{disk: string, file_store_path: string, file_real_name: string}
     */
    private function getBackgroundCheckAuthFile(int $resumeId): ?array
    {
        Log::info('[背调附件] getBackgroundCheckAuthFile resume_id='.$resumeId);
        $or = OnboardingReviewMd::where('resume_id', $resumeId)->orderBy('id', 'desc')->first();
        if (!$or) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 未找到 onboarding_review resume_id='.$resumeId);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] onboarding_review id='.$or->id);
        $file = FileStorePathMd::where('table_name', 'onboarding_review')
            ->where('table_id', $or->id)
            ->where('type', 'backgroundCheck')
            ->where('is_on', 1)
            ->first();
        if (!$file) {
            Log::warning('[背调附件] 未找到 type=backgroundCheck 文件 table_id='.$or->id);
            return null;
        }
        Log::info('[背调附件] FileStorePath id='.$file->id.', disk='.$file->disk.', file_store_path='.$file->file_store_path);
        return [
            'disk' => $file->disk ?: 'onboarding_review',
            'file_store_path' => $file->file_store_path,
            'file_real_name' => $file->file_real_name ?? '',
        ];
    }

    private function getWorkExpPositionDefault(array $workExp): string
    {
        if (!empty($workExp['position'])) {
            return $workExp['position'];
        }
        $desc = $workExp['description'] ?? '';
        if ($desc) {
            $parts = explode(' | ', $desc);
            return $parts[0] ?? '';
        }
        return '';
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Models\Traits\TCommonModelScope;

/**
 * App\Models\BackgroundCheckRecordMd.
 *
 * @property int $id
 * @property int $rec_pro_id
 * @property int $resume_id
 * @property null|int $work_experience_index
 * @property null|string $company
 * @property null|string $position
 * @property null|string $work_location
 * @property null|string $employment_type
 * @property null|string $start_date
 * @property null|string $end_date
 * @property null|string $salary_structure
 * @property null|string $departure_type
 * @property null|string $has_compensation
 * @property null|string $background_check_email
 * @property string $status
 * @property null|string $feedback_content
 * @property null|string $email_subject
 * @property null|string $email_content
 * @property null|\Illuminate\Support\Carbon $sent_at
 * @property null|\Illuminate\Support\Carbon $feedback_at
 * @property null|string $skip_reason
 * @property null|string $skip_specific_reason
 * @property null|string $created_at
 * @property null|string $updated_at
 *
 * @property null|\App\Models\RecruitmentProcessionMd $recruitmentProcession
 * @property null|\App\Models\ResumeMd $resume
 *
 * @mixin \Eloquent
 */
class BackgroundCheckRecordMd extends MyModel
{
    use TCommonModelScope;

    public const STATUS_PENDING = 'pending';
    public const STATUS_FEEDBACK = 'feedback';
    public const STATUS_EXPIRED = 'expired';

    /** 用户选择跳过背调：转为线下 */
    public const SKIP_OFFLINE = 'offline';
    /** 用户选择跳过背调：无需背调 */
    public const SKIP_NO_NEED = 'no_need';
    /** 用户选择跳过背调：候选人暂未离职，将在入职前完成 */
    public const SKIP_DEFERRED = 'not_resigned';

    protected $table = 'background_check_records';

    protected $fillable = [
        'rec_pro_id', 'resume_id', 'work_experience_index', 'company', 'position', 'work_location',
        'employment_type', 'start_date', 'end_date', 'salary_structure', 'departure_type', 'has_compensation',
        'background_check_email', 'email_search', 'status', 'feedback_content', 'email_subject', 'email_content', 'sent_at', 'feedback_at',
        'skip_reason', 'skip_specific_reason',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'sent_at' => 'datetime',
        'feedback_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function recruitmentProcession(): \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(RecruitmentProcessionMd::class, 'rec_pro_id', 'id');
    }

    public function resume(): \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(ResumeMd::class, 'resume_id', 'id');
    }
}

---

All three bugs are fixed. Here's the summary（总结）:

### Bug 1: 雇佣类别 — dropdown → text input ✓
- **File**: `SendBackgroundCheckDia.vue:88-95`
- **Change**: `el-select` → `el-input` with green hint text "（正式员工/外派/外包/第三方编制等，根据面聊情况填）"
- Validation trigger changed from `change` to `blur`

### Bug 2: 附件预览 ✓
- **File**: `SendBackgroundCheckDia.vue`
- **Change**: Added "预览" button next to "下载", with a preview dialog using `PdfPreview2` + `el-image` (same pattern as OfferView)
- Supports PDF/PNG/JPG preview; other formats fall back to download

### Bug 3: "至今" end_date causing email failure ✓
- **Root cause（根因）**: Work experience with empty `end_time` (currently employed) → `end_date` became `''` → backend `required` validation rejected it
- **Frontend fixes** (SendBackgroundCheckDia.vue):
  - `fillFromWorkExperience`: Empty `end_time` → sets `end_date = '至今'`, auto-sets `is_employed = '是'`
  - `selectedWorkExp` sorting: Empty `end_time` treated as `Infinity` (most recent, sorted first)
  - Date display: Always shows `start_date 至 end_date|至今`
- **Backend fixes**:
  - `BackgroundCheckController.php:54`: `'end_date' => 'required|string'` → `'nullable|string'`
  - `BackgroundCheckService.php:89`: Removed `endDate` from empty-check (only company/position/startDate required)
  - `BackgroundCheckService.php:300-304`: Fixed sorting — empty `end_time` = `PHP_INT_MAX` (most recent)
- **BackgroundCheckView.vue**: `formatDateRange` now shows "至今" when `end_date` is empty

---

**中文总结**：
1. 雇佣类别从下拉选择改为文本输入框，带绿色提示文字
2. 背调授权书附件增加了"预览"按钮，支持PDF/图片在线预览
3. 修复了工作经历结束时间为"至今"时背调邮件无法发送的bug：前端自动填充"至今"并设置在职状态，后端放宽end_date校验，前后端排序都把无结束时间的经历视为最新

Here's a summary of the latest information on **Claude Code IDE integration** with **VS Code** and **JetBrains** IDEs in 2026:

---

## VS Code Extension

The VS Code extension provides a native graphical interface for Claude Code, integrated directly into your IDE. This is the recommended way to use Claude Code in VS Code.

**Key features include:**
- You can review and edit Claude's plans before accepting them, auto-accept edits as they're made, @-mention files with specific line ranges from your selection, access conversation history, and open multiple conversations in separate tabs or windows.
- The extension includes the CLI (command-line interface), which you can access from VS Code's integrated terminal for advanced features.

**Installation:**
- In VS Code, press Cmd+Shift+X (Mac) or Ctrl+Shift+X (Windows/Linux) to open the Extensions view, search for "Claude Code", and click Install.

**Additional capabilities:**
- The VS Code extension can connect to Chrome for testing web applications. This requires the Claude in Chrome extension (version 1.0.36+). Useful for end-to-end testing and debugging visual issues.
- You can reference terminal output in your prompts using @terminal:name, which lets Claude see command output, error messages, or logs without copy-pasting.

---

## JetBrains Plugin (Beta)

The JetBrains plugin requires Claude Code to be installed separately.

Claude Code also has a plugin for JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, and others).

**Installation:**
- Install via JetBrains Marketplace — Open your JetBrains IDE, go to Settings > Plugins > Marketplace, search for "Claude Code", and install. The plugin uses the same credentials as the CLI. If you have not authenticated yet, open the integrated terminal in your JetBrains IDE and run `claude` to complete the login flow.

**How it works:**
- It primarily runs the Claude Code CLI inside your IDE's integrated terminal and opens proposed changes in your IDE's diff viewer. You'll use keyboard shortcuts to launch it quickly.
- The JetBrains plugin provides a similar chat experience to the VS Code extension, with file references and conversation history. Configuration is shared via the same `~/.claude/settings.json` file.

There's also a community plugin: **Claude Code with GUI** brings the same Claude Code GUI found in Cursor and VS Code to JetBrains IDEs.

---

## VS Code Extension vs. JetBrains Plugin

VS Code gives you a native graphical extension surface. JetBrains provides a plugin that orchestrates the CLI and uses the IDE diff viewer for review/accept flows. The workflows are similar, but the UI integration differs.

The VS Code extension is the most polished IDE integration, providing a native graphical chat panel, checkpoint-based undo, @-mention file references, and parallel conversations.

---

## General Benefits of IDE Integration

Switching between your editor and a separate terminal window breaks your flow — you are constantly alt-tabbing, copy-pasting file paths, and losing context. The IDE integrations solve this by putting Claude Code directly inside your editor, where it can see your open files, your cursor position, and your terminal output.

Now let me fix both issues.

content.text:
---

### 改动总结

**Root cause（根因）**: Vue 2 的 `<template>` 只允许一个根元素。代码里两个 `<el-dialog>` 平级放在 template 里，Vue 2 **静默丢弃第二个 dialog**（预览弹窗），所以：
- 点击"预览"按钮后，`handlePreviewAttach` 执行了，但 `previewDia.visible = true` 设置的 dialog 根本不存在于 DOM
- F12 没报错、没日志，因为 Vue 2 不会对多根元素报错，只是默默忽略

**Fix**: 用 `<div>` 包裹两个 dialog，确保只有一个 root element。

**三种可能原因分析：**
1. ~~disk `'onboarding_review'` 不存在~~ — 已修复但不是主因
2. **Vue 2 单根元素限制导致预览 dialog 不渲染** — **这是真正的根因**
3. ~~file 对象缺少 `file_name_encrypt` 字段~~ — 排除，OfferView 用同样数据源能预览

**自省**: 上次改 disk 的时候就该检查 template 结构的，我只盯着数据流看，忽略了 Vue 2 最基本的限制。日志也加了，你可以先部署看看，如果预览弹窗弹出来了，后续可以把调试日志删掉。

content.text:
Sure daddy, here are the key English words from this session:

1. **silently** (默默地) — Vue 2 **silently** discards the second root element. 不报错、不提示，直接丢掉。

2. **sibling** (兄弟/平级的) — Two **sibling** `<el-dialog>` elements in the template. 指 DOM 树中同层级的元素。

3. **tooltip** (工具提示) — A small popup that appears on hover. 鼠标悬停时弹出的提示框。

4. **fallback** (兜底值/回退) — `file.disk || 'course'` — `'course'` is the **fallback** value. 当主值不存在时使用的备选值。

5. **root element** (根元素) — Vue 2 requires exactly one **root element** per template. 模板的最外层只能有一个元素。

6. **comprehensive** (全面的) — Added **comprehensive** logs to debug. 覆盖各个环节的、详尽的。

7. **discard** (丢弃) — Vue 2 will **discard** the extra root node. 直接扔掉，不处理。

8. **render** (渲染) — The preview dialog never **renders** in the DOM. 把数据/组件转化为页面上可见的 UI。

---

**Sentence practice（造句练习）:**
> "Vue 2 **silently discards** **sibling** elements, so only the first **root element** **renders** — the second one becomes a useless **fallback** that never appears."

Here are more useful words from our debugging session:

9. **nested** (嵌套的) — I checked if the dialog was **nested** inside another dialog. 一个元素包含在另一个元素里面。

10. **intercept** (拦截) — I suspected the click event might be **intercepted**. 中途截获，阻止事件继续传递。

11. **traverse** (遍历) — Don't modify a collection while **traversing** it. 逐个访问集合中的每个元素。

12. **idempotent** (幂等的) — An **idempotent** API returns the same result no matter how many times you call it. 调多少次结果都一样。

13. **reversible** (可逆的) — Always consider if an action is **reversible** before executing. 能撤回的、能恢复原状的。

14. **blast radius** (影响范围/爆炸半径) — Check the **blast radius** before making changes. 一个改动会波及多大范围，源自军事术语。

15. **critical** (关键的/致命的) — The single root element rule is a **critical** constraint in Vue 2. 至关重要的，不能忽视的。

16. **eliminate** (排除) — We **eliminated** the disk issue and found the real root cause. 逐一排除可能性。

---

**Sentence practice（造句练习）:**
> "Before making a **critical** change, check the **blast radius**, make sure it's **reversible**, and **eliminate** other possible causes — don't just **intercept** the symptom."

> "When **traversing** a **nested** data structure, ensure your API calls are **idempotent** to avoid side effects."
